DoGDeskOS Repository Portal

Repository Access

Announcements

● Repository operational

Welcome to the official DoGDeskOS package repository.

Official Packages

poke-mini
Minimal Poke Package Manager
kanto-libs
Repository compatibility layer
hrun
Heinola Runtime launcher
hedit95
Heinola Edit 95 text editor

Installation

eselect repository add dogdeskos git https://github.com/doggys-hub/dogdesk-overlay.git
emaint sync -r dogdeskos
